BLS Employment Analysis B-1a: Employees on Nonfarm Payrolls by Industry 📄 Guide
Table B-1a: Employees on Nonfarm Payrolls by Industry Sector
842 series

Seasonally adjusted, thousands of employees. Trend methods fit Jan 2010–Feb 2020, extrapolated forward. pct=XX = percentile of current share in full historical series (2000–present).

1 Dev. Log Level: log(emp) minus a linear time trend (Jan 2010–Feb 2020). Unaffected by denominator choice.
2 Dev. Log Share: log(share) minus a linear time trend (Jan 2010–Feb 2020). Changes with denominator.
3 Dev. Log Share (HP): log(share) minus HP-filter counterfactual (λ=129,600, fit Jan 2010–Feb 2020, extrapolated by last-24-month slope). Changes with denominator.
4 Dev. Raw Share: (actual−trend)/trend where trend is linear (Jan 2010–Feb 2020). Changes with denominator.
Industry Feb-26
